name: Neewer Q3 TTL Flash Strobe Kit with QPRO-S Trigger
description: Featuring a 2.4 GHz wireless system with a range of up to 328', the Q3 TTL Flash Strobe Kit with QPRO-S Trigger from Neewer is a 200W flash strobe that features a 5600K color temperature and guide number of 190'. It is powered by a rechargeable battery and offers flash, sync, and optical slave flash modes S1 and S2.

features.Key Features: Cordless Wireless 2.4 GHz Monolight | 200W Flash with 5600K CCT | Flash, Sync & Optical Slave Flash Modes | High Speed Sync: 1/8000 sec | Recycling: 0.01 to 1.8 Second | Flash Duration: 1/220 to 1/15,380 Second | Rechargeable Lithium Battery | Includes QPRO-S Trigger for Sony | Includes Battery, Charger & Power Cable | Includes Mounting Bracket & Carry Case
features.What’s In The Box: 1x Q3 Flash Strobe | 1x QPRO-S/N/C Flash Trigger | 1x Stand Mount Bracket | 1x Softbox Diffuser 6” x 5” | 1x Lithium Battery | 1x Battery Charger | 1x Power Cable | 1x Carrying Case
